title: Be a leader of man amongst men — two-line uncommon-amongst-uncommon manifesto
html:
Be a leader of man amongst men — two-line uncommon-amongst-uncommon manifesto

Source: 2025-11-20 Apple Note. Two lines, written ~2 months into the Austin chapter and one week before the Ethan Hemstead call. A pure manifesto style note specimen — first-person aspirational.

TL;DR

  • "Be a leader of man amongst men" — first directive, casts Yahir into the leader role.
  • "Be uncommon amongst the uncommon" — second directive, escalates from being-different-from-normal to being-different-from-the-already-different.
  • Sits in the manifesto style note evolution between the Sept 2024 14 bullet Shanghai manifesto (still hesitant, second-person bullets) and the Feb 2026 polished four paragraph identity statement (fully first-person declarative).
  • Written during the Rankett ramp — pre-GTM bible, post-Austin-survival period — when Yahir is repositioning his self-image from "broke recent grad" toward "category founder."
  • One of the shortest note as letter to self entries in the 2025 corpus, but high signal-density per word.

Key quote

"Be uncommon amongst the uncommon."

Pattern observed

The escalation in framing — uncommon amongst the uncommon — is a leader as network not iq adjacent move: assumes the room is already filtered for uncommonness and demands further differentiation within it. This is Yahir already mentally placing himself in the AGM / Chamath / Palmer Luckey tier of operators he reads about, then asking: how do I outperform that tier?

The two-line form is the gym-scratchpad variant of the manifesto — captured in 30 seconds, designed to be re-read in 30 seconds. Sister note to the Dec 2 "ferociously obsessed" line and the Jan 22 "I am a fucking killer" line — three back-to-back single-imperative manifestos through Nov 2025 → Jan 2026.

Open questions

  • What triggered this specific phrasing? (The "amongst" vocabulary is uncommon for Yahir — borrowed from a podcast / book?)
  • Is the leader-of-men role aimed at Rankett team (Diddles, Elijah, etc.) or at a broader self-image?

  • 2025 12 02 are you willing to go deeper
